Article Title: 'Criminal decision': Rishabh Pant faces heat for Nicholas Pooran call in Super Over loss to KKR
Article Text:
Rishabh Pant and Nicholas Pooran (Image credit: BCCI/IPL)

Watch Bombay Sport Exchange: Munaf Patel on Gautam Gambhir, Virat vs Bumrah & Indian bowling. Bombay Sport Exchange: Munaf Patel on Gautam Gambhir, Virat vs Bumrah & Indian bowling.

Poll Do you think LSG made the right call in the Super Over? Yes, it was a fair choice No, it was a mistake

NEW DELHI: The IPL 2026 clash between Lucknow Super Giants and Kolkata Knight Riders turned out to be a gripping thriller. Rinku Singh steered Kolkata Knight Riders to a comfortable win over Lucknow Super Giants on Sunday in the first Super Over of IPL 2026. LSG managed just one run in the Super Over, leaving KKR with a target of two. In response, Singh smashed a four off the very first ball to seal the game for KKR.LSG, who batted first in the Super Over, faced heavy criticism for sending Nicholas Pooran in to bat against KKR in that crucial moment.Pooran, already struggling with the bat this season, was dismissed on the very first ball of the Super Over by Sunil Narine.Former South Africa pacer Dale Steyn did not hold back and criticised LSG for the decision to send Pooran in, which backfired badly for the Rishabh Pant-led side.Steyn termed the move ‘criminal’.“Three Super Overs for Nicholas Pooran in the IPL, three ducks. So, yes, absolutely. Would you send someone else? Of course. You’ve got players like Mitch Marsh, Rishabh Pant , and Mukul Choudhary. Given Pooran’s recent form, there were other options," Steyn told broadcaster JioHotstar."He hasn’t scored more than 30 or 40 runs this season, I don’t know the exact numbers, but to send him in first ball in a Super Over to get you runs is almost a criminal decision,” he added.“It could have gone either way, but at this stage of the season, when you’re desperate to win, you don’t send in a batter who hasn’t delivered all season. You go with players who’ve been striking the ball well, guys you trust to clear the ropes, or at least back to do the job. I don’t even think Nicholas Pooran believes he can do it right now; he’s in such a bad run of form,” Steyn said.“It’s unfortunate because he’s such a wonderful player. But when you’re trying to revive your season, you can’t afford blunders like that, not at this level,” he added.Soon after Pooran’s dismissal, Steyn also took to social media and wrote: “Couldn’t hit water if he fell out a boat. Tough times."With the defeat against KKR on Sunday, LSG slipped to the bottom of the points table with just four points from eight matches.
Article Summary: Ipl 2026 clash between lucknow super giants and kolkata knight riders turned out to be a gripping thriller. Rinku singh smashed a four off the very first ball to seal the game for kkr. Lsg faced heavy criticism for sending nicholas pooran in to bat against kkr in that crucial moment.

Article Title: 'Missing father-in-law a lot today': Fiancée Priya Saroj after Rinku Singh’s heroics - Watch
Article Text:
Fiancée Priya Saroj and Rinku Singh (Photos by screengrab and PTI)

Watch Bombay Sport Exchange: Munaf Patel on Gautam Gambhir, Virat vs Bumrah & Indian bowling. Bombay Sport Exchange: Munaf Patel on Gautam Gambhir, Virat vs Bumrah & Indian bowling.

NEW DELHI: Rinku Singh delivered a memorable all-round performance for Kolkata Knight Riders in their dramatic Super Over win against Lucknow Super Giants on Sunday in another thriller of IPL 2026 season, but the night also carried deep personal emotion.Reacting to Rinku's performance, his fiancée Priya Saroj said, "Hum bohot khush hain. Aaj unhone (Rinku) khela hi father-in-law k liye, aaj unko hum bohot miss kar rahe hain, aur yeh unke liye hi hai, [We are very happy. Today he (Rinku) played for my father-in-law; we are missing him a lot today, and this is all for him.]" highlighting how the knock was dedicated to his late father.Rinku’s father, Khanchand Singh, passed away earlier this year, at the age of 57 after battling stage-four liver cancer. The loss came during the T20 World Cup, forcing Rinku to briefly return home to Aligarh for the last rites, a moment that has clearly stayed with him.On Sunday in this IPL 2026 game, that emotion seemed to translate into performance. Walking in with KKR reeling at 93/7, Rinku anchored the innings with a career-best unbeaten 83 off 51 balls.He paced his knock smartly before unleashing a stunning assault in the final over, smashing four consecutive sixes to lift KKR to 155/7.With LSG matching the total, the match headed into a Super Over. Sunil Narine then turned the game with the ball, dismissing Nicholas Pooran and Aiden Markram.Rinku was again at the centre of action, completing a relay catch with Rovman Powell Chasing just two runs, Rinku fittingly struck the winning boundary.The UP-born cricketer was sensational with his fielding too as he also took five catches in this IPL 2026 match, capping a remarkable all-round display that earned him the Player of the Match award, a performance made even more meaningful by the emotions behind it.
Article Summary: Kolkata knight riders beat lucknow super giants by one run in ipl 2026. Rinku singh scored a career-best 83 off 51 balls. His father, khanchand singh, passed away earlier this year after battling liver cancer.

Article Title: Ipl Orange Cap: IPL 2026: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi overtakes Virat Kohli, KL Rahul in Orange Cap race after sensational ton
Article Text:
Rajasthan Royals' Vaibhav Sooryavanshi (AP Photo)

Watch ‘We haven’t played good cricket’ - Mahela Jayawardene after MI’s biggest IPL loss vs CSK ‘We haven’t played good cricket’ - Mahela Jayawardene after MI’s biggest IPL loss vs CSK

Orange Cap 2026 standings:

Position Player Runs Average Strike Rate 1 Vaibhav Sooryavanshi 357 44.63 234.87 2 KL Rahul 357 59.50 187.89 3 Virat Kohli 328 54.67 163.18 4 Abhishek Sharma 323 53.83 215.33 5 Heinrich Klassen 320 53.33 153.11

Vaibhav Sooryavanshi continues to pile up records at a staggering pace in IPL 2026, with the teenage sensation rewriting milestones almost every game and now climbing to the very top of the Orange Cap race.Sooryavanshi’s stunning rise reached another landmark as he surged to the top of the Orange Cap standings, overtaking Virat Kohli after yet another explosive hundred for Rajasthan Royals Sooryavanshi now has 357 runs from eight matches at an average of 44.63 and a staggering strike rate of 234.87. Interestingly, KL Rahul also moved to 357 runs following his unbeaten 152 against Punjab Kings. However, it is Sooryavanshi who sits at the top due to his superior strike rate. Kohli, who had led the charts earlier, has 328 runs at an average of 54.67 and a strike rate of 163.18.The latest surge came through a breathtaking innings against Sunrisers Hyderabad, where Sooryavanshi hammered a 37-ball 103, his second IPL hundred. The 15-year-old dominated from the outset and set the tone early, even taking on Praful Hinge with four consecutive sixes in the opening over as a statement of intent.He found strong support in Dhruv Jurel, who compiled a fluent half-century, and together they stitched a 112-run stand for the second wicket that laid the foundation for a massive total. Jurel’s composed 51 off 35 balls ensured the pressure never dipped, while Sooryavanshi continued to dismantle the bowling attack with fearless strokeplay.The youngster brought up his half-century in just 15 balls during the powerplay, continuing a remarkable trend this season. He later converted it into a century in just 36 balls, peppering the boundary with five fours and 12 sixes before being dismissed for 103 off 37 deliveries.Late fireworks from Donovan Ferreira added further momentum as Rajasthan Royals finished with a commanding 228 for 6 in their 20 overs.
Article Summary: Rajasthan royals' vaibhav sooryavanshi has overtaken virat kohli at the top of the orange cap standings. The 15-year-old hit 103 against sunrisers hyderabad, his second ipl hundred. He now has 357 runs from eight matches at an average of 44.63 and a staggering strike rate of 234.87.

Article Title: Wedding ring detail in Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini's alleged affair moment adds new twist amid outrage
Article Text:
Wedding ring detail in Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini's alleged affair moment adds new twist amid outrage.(Image via Getty Images)

Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini’s pictures spark chaos about his wedding ring as his wife stays silent



Is Mike Vrabel getting fired after Dianna Russini had to leave her job?



Mike Vrabel, the New England Patriots’ head coach, has landed himself in major trouble alongside his alleged affair partner Dianna Russini.Though the two initially denied having an affair, their pictures from 2020 sharing a kiss at a bar have sparked outrage.A few hours ago, as Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini’s pictures from the New York City bar in 2020 sparked chaos, it seems a tiny detail was missed which eagle eyed fans have uncovered.In the pictures, Mike Vrabel was spotted holding Dianna Russini with his left hand as he approached her for a kiss. The New England Patriots’ head coach’s wedding ring was fully visible as he held on to her and it has sparked outrage.A fan commented, “The detail in the picture is that he’s touching her with the same hand his wedding ring is on…”, while another fan wrote, “With the wedding ring on and everything. Vrabs needs to step down as HC. Coaches resign or get fired for much less.”A third fan posted, “This was literally the night after the WHO declared COVID a pandemic! They knew their time together would be limited after this night!!”Many fans have expressed how heartbroken they are for Mike Vrabel’s wife, Jennifer Vrabel, and Dianna Russini’s husband, Kevin Goldschmidt, even though both have tried to stay out of the spotlight and remain silent about the alleged affair drama.While Dianna Russini has deleted her account on X, Mike Vrabel has addressed the pictures from 2020 even though he did not directly speak about it,At a recent press conference, after Mike Vrabel expressed that he needs to step away from NFL Draft, he said, “My priorities are my family and this football and in that order…”The New England Patriots’ head coach added, “There's a balance there that I’m going to create. My family needs me this weekend and that’s where I’ll be."While there have been strong speculations of his employment ending soon with the New England Patriots, the team has stayed away from confirming anything for now.
Article Summary: Wedding ring detail in mike vrabel and dianna russini's alleged affair moment adds new twist amid outrage. New england patriots’ head coach’s wedding ring was fully visible as he held on to her and it has sparked outrage.

Article Title: Ronaldo has three final career dreams he must fulfil before retirement, Messi has already completed the first
Article Text:
As Messi takes control of UE Cornellà, he joins Ronaldo in Spanish football as club owners in rival roles.(Image via Getty)

The missing piece: a World Cup title

The race to 1,000 career goals

Also read:

A different kind of milestone: playing with Cristiano Jr

Current form and final stretch

Poll Do you think Cristiano Ronaldo will lead Portugal to a World Cup victory in 2026? Yes, he will lead them to victory. No, they won't win the World Cup.

At a time when most players are years into retirement and settled into coaching or punditry, 41-year-old Cristiano Ronaldo is choosing his final act carefully, with three clear goals still on his agenda. The Portugal forward is expected to make his sixth appearance at the 2026 FIFA World Cup, which he has indicated will be his last, bringing his career to a close with one final push for legacy, numbers, and something more personal.The most obvious goal is also the one that has clearly defined the final chapter of his international career. Ronaldo has never won a World Cup, despite playing in five editions between 2006 and 2022, making 22 appearances and scoring eight total goals. His best finish still remains fourth place in 2006.Winning the World Cup is the one major honour missing from his record, and it stands out even more because Lionel Messi already has it, winning the tournament on December 18, 2022, when he led Argentina past France in Qatar. That comparison has followed both players for years, and it still shapes how their careers are judged.Portugal are not traditionally among the favourites, and historically have only reached the semi-finals twice, in 1966 and 2006.However, their European Championship win in 2016 serves as a reminder that they can compete beyond expectations. Despite a minor hamstring injury in March 2026 and a previous red-card suspension that was later lifted, Portugal coach Roberto Martínez continues to view Ronaldo as a key part of the squad heading into the tournament.Alongside the international ambition, Ronaldo is also closing in on a statistical milestone that has rarely been approached in football history.He scored his 969th career goal on April 19, 2026, during Al Nassr FC’s 4-0 win over Al Wasl FC in the AFC Champions League 2 quarter-finals, finding the net in the 11th minute. That leaves him within reach of the 1,000-goal mark, a figure that has become a clear personal target.Messi, currently on 905 goals, is also within distance, although the approach appears different. While Ronaldo continues to push towards the milestone, Messi has shown less urgency, even passing up opportunities, including allowing Nicolás Otamendi to take a penalty so he could mark his farewell moment with the national team, a gesture that shows he’s not chasing numbers in the same way.The contrast is not about ability but intent. Ronaldo’s pursuit of 1,000 has become part of his closing narrative, a target he is actively chasing rather than something that might happen along the way.The third objective is less conventional but equally significant for Ronaldo. There is now a realistic possibility that he could share the pitch at senior level with his son, Cristiano Ronaldo Jr..The idea has gained traction after reports that Al Nassr are considering promoting Ronaldo’s eldest son to the first team. Cristiano Jr. will turn 16 in June, and while that step would still depend on development and timing, the possibility is no longer distant.If it happens, it would place Ronaldo in a rare category of athletes who have competed alongside their children at the highest level. The comparison most often drawn is with LeBron James and Bronny James, who have moved towards a similar milestone in the NBA.In football, such instances are extremely rare, particularly at top-flight level, which is why this objective carries a different kind of weight. It is not tied to trophies or records, but to a moment that would stand on its own in the sport’s history.Ronaldo’s form suggests these targets are not purely symbolic. Even at 41, he continues to influence games and contribute decisively for Al Nassr, maintaining a level that keeps him relevant both at club level and internationally. His current deal with the Saudi club runs until 2027, signed in a record-breaking extension that will keep him there into his 42nd year, with reports placing his earnings at around €200 million per season, along with performance bonuses and commercial add-ons tied to goals and success.On the international front, he remains central to Portugal’s plans for the 2026 FIFA World Cup in June, which is expected to mark the final chapter of his international career. He continues to play a key role in qualifying and leadership within the squad, consistently guiding a younger generation, while still leading the attack as they prepare for one last major tournament together at the highest level.
Article Summary: Cristiano ronaldo is closing in on the 1,000-goal mark in his career. The 41-year-old has never won a world cup, despite playing in five editions between 2006 and 2022. He scored his 969th career goal on april 19, 2026, during al nassr fc’s 4-0 win over al wasl fc in the afc champions league 2 quarter-finals.

Article Title: Carlos Alcaraz French Open exit sparks Andrea Petkovic reaction as Rafael Jodar steals Madrid Open spotlight
Article Text:
Andrea Petkovic (Image Via Getty)

Andrea Petkovic explains how Rafael Jodar changed the Madrid Open conversation after Carlos Alcaraz’s exit

Carlos Alcaraz’s withdrawal from the 2026 French Open changed the mood at the Madrid Open very quickly. The Spanish star was one of the biggest favorites to defend his Roland Garros title and possibly win his third straight clay-court Grand Slam. But after his injury update, attention inside Spain shifted fast. Former German tennis player Andrea Petkovic gave an honest reaction to that change. Speaking about the Madrid Open atmosphere, she said fans quickly turned their focus from Alcaraz to teenage Spanish talent Rafael Jodar after his big win over Alex de Minaur.Her comments caught attention because they showed how quickly tennis moves on, even from its biggest stars.Alcaraz had played the Barcelona Open shortly after losing to his rival Jannik Sinner at the Monte Carlo Masters. In Madrid, he faced Otto Virtanen and looked uncomfortable during the match after feeling pain in his right wrist and forearm. Even though he won 6-4, 6-2, medical tests later forced him to withdraw from Roland Garros.With Carlos Alcaraz out, 18-year-old Rafael Jodar became the new talking point for Spanish fans.The young player shocked many by beating Alex de Minaur 6-3, 6-1 in just 75 minutes. It was his first win against a top-10 player and suddenly the spotlight was on him.Andrea Petkovic spoke about this shift and said tennis fans often move on faster than expected. She said, “I will say, though, people and tennis fans move on really quickly. The moment Rafael Jodar beat Alex de Minaur, it was like Carlos Alcaraz never existed, and the Spanish fans just… it is true.”She continued, “It is a terrible sport. We are terrible people. But this is, unfortunately, the world of capitalism.”Even while dealing with injury disappointment, Alcaraz had another major reason to smile. He won the 2026 Laureus World Sportsman of the Year award after an outstanding 2025 season where he claimed eight titles, including the French Open and US Open.Speaking through ATP Tour, Alcaraz shared how special the moment felt, especially because of his admiration for football legend Lionel Messi.He said, “Three years ago, I received the Laureus Breakthrough Award in Paris and met one of my heroes, Leo Messi, who won the Laureus Sportsman Award. At the time, I dreamt that maybe one day I would join the great Leo Messi on the Sportsman list, and today, I have.”He added, “Messi, Federer, Djokovic, Usain Bolt, and of course the great Rafa Nadal. I am following in the footsteps of giants. That makes this moment so special.”
Article Summary: Carlos alcaraz’s withdrawal from the 2026 french open changed the mood at the madrid open very quickly. The spanish star was one of the biggest favorites to defend his roland garros title and possibly win his third straight clay-court grand slam. But after his injury update, attention inside spain shifted fast.

Article Title: "He fathered her child": Dianna Russini’s alleged confession about her older son adds a new twist to the Mike Vrabel saga
Article Text:
Dianna Russini’s alleged confession about her older son adds a new twist to the Mike Vrabel saga.(Image via Getty Images)

Dianna Russini might have hinted at her alleged affair with Mike Vrabel through her child

Mike Vrabel stepped away from NFL Draft after he reportedly got to know his pictures with Dianna Russini from 2020 will be published

Mike Vrabel, the New England Patriots’ head coach, has publicly announced that he is taking some time off to seek counselling as the alleged affair rumors with Dianna Russini refuse to die down.Amid all the mess, it seems the situation has taken a turn for the worse as Dianna Russini’s husband and child have been dragged into the drama.In the last few hours, a post of Dianna Russini about the birth of her child with her husband, Kevin Goldschmidt, has sparked shockwaves across the league.The post made on 11th August, 2021, reads as, “Keep looking at my almost 4 day old son Michael while trying to figure out who are the best Michaels to ever play and coach in the NFL?”While the post seems like an innocent question related to the name of her child, it has raised eyebrows considering Mike Vrabel’s legal name is Michael George Vrabel.With the former The New York Times’ popular NFL reporter and insider, Dianna Russini naming her first born the same name as her alleged affair partner, it has sparked outrage among fans.This has also led to Barstool Sports’ Dave Portnoy to make a post that read as, “I can’t believe that I think there is a chance Russini fathered Vrabel’s child. That is how nuts this has gotten. You just can’t name your kid the same name as the guy you are having an affair with.”To make matters worse, just a couple of hours ago, Page Six also published photos of Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini engaging in a kiss at a New York City bar in 2020, six years before they were spotted at a hotel together.This has now raised concerns about Dianna Russini’s first born as many fans are urging her husband to get a DNA test done.However, both Dianna Russini and her husband, Kevin Goldschmidt, have stayed distant from all the rumors about their marriage going downhill as their oldest son gets dragged into the drama.Interestingly, as per Page Six, the outlet did ask for the popular head coach, Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini’s comments before publishing their photos together from 2020.Just hours later, the New England Patriots’ head coach announced that he will be stepping away from the NFL Draft as he seeks counselling for all the things that have been happening in his life.The popular NFL insider and reporter, Dianna Russini, has stayed silent as their new pictures spark shockwaves across the league.
Article Summary: Dianna russini’s alleged confession about her older son adds a new twist to the mike vrabel saga. The new england patriots’ head coach has publicly announced that he is taking some time off to seek counselling as the alleged affair rumors refuse to die down.

Article Title: “Titans uncovered the affair”: Mike Vrabel’s exit from the Tennessee Titans tied to alleged Dianna Russini drama
Article Text:
Mike Vrabel’s exit from the Tennessee Titans tied to alleged Dianna Russini drama.(Image via Getty Images)

Mike Vrabel’s firing from the Tennessee Titans linked to his alleged affair drama with Dianna Russini



Will Mike Vrabel be fired by the New England Patriots because of Dianna Russini?



Mike Vrabel, the New England Patriots’ head coach, has taken some time off from work to be with his family as his alleged affair rumors with Dianna Russini continue to get worse.Though the New England Patriots have not yet hinted at firing Mike Vrabel ahead of the new season, it seems his time with the Tennessee Titans is being viewed differently.A few hours ago, Fox Sports Radio host Jared Smith made a post on X which read as, “We're like one story away from finding out the Titans uncovered the affair and it being the reason they fired him in 2024…” and millions have agreed with him.But nothing has been confirmed yet as the Tennessee Titans maintain their fair share of distance from the alleged affair drama concerning their ex coach, Mike Vrabel.For the unversed, 2024 proved to be a rocky year for Mike Vrabel as he dealt with being fired by the Tennessee Titans after six seasons with the team.Back in January 2024, the Tennessee Titans' controlling owner Amy Adams Strunk spoke about how the team never considered trading Mike Vrabel and instead fired him.The Tennessee Titans' controlling owner Amy Adams Strunk said, "Yes, there was. But there's a bit of misconception about a coach's contract, say versus a player's contract. A coach's contract, you can't trade them unless they are a willing partner to that trade…”She added, “So, yes, we thought about it but at the end of the day with league rules the way they are it would have maybe put us back three weeks and you know, to get the right head coach I was just not willing to go to the back of the line and take a chance of missing out on someone we really wanted."For now, all eyes are on what the New England Patriots choose to do next with Mike Vrabel, as there are strong rumors about the team firing him.However, nothing has been confirmed yet as the New England Patriots continue to stand by Mike Vrabel’s side amid his alleged affair drama with Dianna Russini,
Article Summary: Mike vrabel’s exit from the tennessee titans tied to alleged dianna russini drama. Fox sports radio host jared smith made a post on x which read as, “we're like one story away from finding out the titans uncovered the affair and it being the reason they fired him in 2024…” and millions have agreed with him.

Article Text:

Squads for Delhi Capitals and Punjab Kings

Delhi Capitals (DC) take on table-toppers Punjab Kings (PBKS) on 25 April 2026 today at the Arun Jaitley Stadium. The afternoon clash, scheduled for 3:30 PM IST, is crucial for DC as they look to bounce back from a heavy defeat, while PBKS aim to extend their unbeaten run in IPL 2026.Delhi Capitals return home under pressure as they face an unbeaten Punjab Kings. After a strong start, DC have lost three of their last four matches and slipped to sixth place, struggling with batting inconsistency, despite improved form from KL Rahul.Their bowling has been led well by Lungi Ngidi, but spin concerns persist with Kuldeep Yadav and Axar Patel yet to deliver consistently.In contrast, PBKS sit comfortably at the top with 11 points, excelling in both batting and bowling. With Arshdeep Singh back in form, they look like a well-balanced side and enter the match as clear favourites, while DC must produce a near-perfect performance to revive their campaign.The pitch at the Arun Jaitley Stadium for today's DC vs PBKS match is expected to be a batting-friendly surface. Historically known for assisting spinners, the ground has recently transformed into a high-scoring venue with a flat, firm wicket that rewards stroke-makers.As this is a 3:30 PM IST start, the intense Delhi heat (peaking at 44°C) will dry out the moisture. This is expected to slow the pitch down in the second innings, offering more grip and turn for spinners like Kuldeep Yadav and Yuzvendra Chahal.The weather in Delhi for today's DC vs PBKS match is dominated by an intense heatwave, making it one of the hottest matchdays of the season. Temperatures are expected to peak at 44°C during the first innings. This will be physically grueling for the fielding side. Since this is a day-night game ending early, dew will not be a factor. The pitch is likely to stay dry and potentially offer more turn for spinners in the second innings.Delhi Capitals (Playing XI): Pathum Nissanka, KL Rahul (wk), Nitish Rana, Sameer Rizvi, David Miller, Tristan Stubbs, Ashutosh Sharma, Axar Patel (c), Kuldeep Yadav, Lungi Ngidi, Mukesh KumarImpact Player: T NatarajanPunjab Kings (Playing XI): Priyansh Arya, Prabhsimran Singh (wk), Cooper Connolly, Shreyas Iyer (c), Marcus Stoinis, Nehal Wadhera, Shashank Singh, Marco Jansen, Xavier Bartlett, Arshdeep Singh, Yuzvendra ChahalImpact Player: Vijaykumar VyshakThe DC vs PBKS clash will be held at the Arun Jaitley Stadium, Delhi with the match set to begin at 3:30 PM IST. The game will be broadcast on the Star Sports Network, while live streaming will be available on JioHotstar.Delhi Capitals Squad: Pathum Nissanka, KL Rahul(w), Nitish Rana, Sameer Rizvi, David Miller, Tristan Stubbs, Ashutosh Sharma, Axar Patel(c), Kuldeep Yadav, Lungi Ngidi, Mukesh Kumar, T Natarajan, Karun Nair, Dushmantha Chameera, Tripurana Vijay, Auqib Nabi Dar, Mitchell Starc, Kyle Jamieson, Rehan Ahmed, Ajay Jadav Mandal, Prithvi Shaw, Abishek Porel, Sahil Parakh, Vipraj Nigam, Madhav TiwariPunjab Kings Squad: Priyansh Arya, Prabhsimran Singh(w), Cooper Connolly, Shreyas Iyer(c), Marcus Stoinis, Nehal Wadhera, Shashank Singh, Marco Jansen, Xavier Bartlett, Arshdeep Singh, Yuzvendra Chahal, Vijaykumar Vyshak, Harpreet Brar, Suryansh Shedge, Yash Thakur, Vishnu Vinod, Ben Dwarshuis, Lockie Ferguson, Azmatullah Omarzai, Mitchell Owen, Harnoor Singh, Musheer Khan, Pyla Avinash, Vishal Nishad, Praveen Dubey

After nine thrilling matches last week, a trend is beginning to emerge on which teams are on a roll and which are still struggling to settle into the new season. So far, 15 matches have been played in the new season of the IPL , and four teams have already set the early marker in the race for the playoffs.With four wins in four matches, Rajasthan Royals sit at the top of the points table. Punjab Kings are at second after two wins and a no result due to rain. Article Title: IPL 2026: Sanju Samson pulls off MS Dhoni-like stunner to dismiss Shubman Gill - WATCH
Article Text:
Sanju Samson and Shubman Gill (Image credit: BCCI/IPL)

Watch ‘We haven’t played good cricket’ - Mahela Jayawardene after MI’s biggest IPL loss vs CSK ‘We haven’t played good cricket’ - Mahela Jayawardene after MI’s biggest IPL loss vs CSK

NEW DELHI: Lightning-quick work behind the stumps, whipping off the bails in a flash - that’s a skill long associated with MS Dhoni . On Sunday, Sanju Samson brought back those memories with a brilliant stumping of Shubman Gill during the IPL 2026 clash between Chennai Super Kings and Gujarat Titans.The moment came in the seventh over of Gujarat Titans’ innings. Defending 158/7, CSK were desperate for a breakthrough.The delivery, drifting down the leg side, almost looked like a wide, and Gill missed his flick. Samson, however, was alert and razor-sharp, collecting the ball and dislodging the bails in a split second with Gill’s foot still in the air.It was a stunning piece of wicketkeeping that lifted the crowd at Chepauk, with fans erupting as Samson’s effort evoked memories of Dhoni’s trademark brilliance behind the stumps.Earlier in the innings, Samson also achieved a major batting milestone, becoming the fastest Indian - in terms of balls faced - to reach 5,000 runs in IPL history. He got there by striking Kagiso Rabada for a boundary, though the pacer later dismissed him for 11.Samson is now the 10th batter overall to cross the 5,000-run mark in the IPL, reaching the milestone in just 180 innings. He took 3555 balls to get there, placing him among the fastest globally, behind players like AB de Villiers.Having represented Rajasthan Royals, Delhi Capitals and CSK since his debut in 2013, Samson has built a reputation as a consistent performer. He joins an elite list featuring Virat Kohli, Rohit Sharma, Shikhar Dhawan, David Warner, KL Rahul, Suresh Raina, MS Dhoni and Ajinkya Rahane.With over 5,000 IPL runs at a strike rate above 140, along with multiple centuries and fifties, Samson continues to underline his value as a dynamic and reliable top-order batter.
Article Summary: Chennai super kings and gujarat titans played in the ipl 2026. Sanju samson made a brilliant stumping of shubman gill. Samson also became the fastest indian to reach 5,000 runs in ipl history. He took 3555 balls to get there, placing him among the fastest globally.

Article Title: IPL 2026: Punjab Kings script history, become second-fastest team to...
Article Text:
Punjab Kings' Prabhsimran Singh and Priyansh Arya (AP Photo)

Watch ‘We haven’t played good cricket’ - Mahela Jayawardene after MI’s biggest IPL loss vs CSK ‘We haven’t played good cricket’ - Mahela Jayawardene after MI’s biggest IPL loss vs CSK

Punjab Kings produced a breathtaking response to Delhi Capitals’ massive total, with openers Priyansh Arya and Prabhsimran Singh tearing into the attack and rewriting powerplay records in IPL 2026.Chasing a daunting 264 after KL Rahul ’s unbeaten 152 and Nitish Rana ’s 91 powered Delhi to 264 for 2, Punjab needed a fearless start. What followed was one of the most explosive powerplay displays in IPL history. Arya and Prabhsimran took DC’s bowlers to the cleaners, racing to 100 in just 5.2 overs, the second-fastest team hundred in IPL history. Only Sunrisers Hyderabad have gone quicker, reaching the mark in 5 overs against Delhi at the same venue in 2024.By the end of the powerplay, Punjab had surged to 116 without loss, the second-highest powerplay total ever in the IPL. The opening pair showed no signs of pressure despite the steep chase, attacking from the outset and maintaining a relentless scoring rate.Arya set the tone early with a blistering start, taking the attack to the bowlers in the powerplay. His aggressive intent was matched perfectly by Prabhsimran, who continued his fine form with a stunning assault of his own.The right-hander raced to 71 not out off just 23 balls in the powerplay, registering one of the highest individual scores in overs 1-6 in IPL history.The duo’s approach completely flipped the narrative of the match. What looked like an imposing total quickly began to feel within reach as Delhi’s bowlers struggled to contain the flow of runs. Boundaries came at will, and the field placements were rendered ineffective as both batters found gaps with ease and cleared the ropes regularly.The stand was eventually broken after the powerplay, but not before significant damage had been done. Arya was dismissed for 43 off 17 balls, falling to captain Axar Patel , while Prabhsimran’s explosive innings came to an end on 76 off just 26 deliveries when he was trapped lbw by Kuldeep Yadav.Earlier, Delhi Capitals had dominated proceedings with the bat. Rahul’s 152 not out, the highest score by an Indian in IPL history, and Rana’s 91 came in a record 220-run partnership off just 96 balls. That effort had set up what seemed like a match-winning total.
Article Summary: Punjab kings produced a breathtaking response to delhi capitals’ massive total. Priyansh arya and prabhsimran singh tore into the attack and rewriting powerplay records in ipl 2026. Punjab had surged to 116 without loss, the second-highest powerplay total ever in the ipl.

Article Text:
Prabhsimran Singh (Image credit: BCCI/IPL)

Six fours in an over in the IPL

NEW DELHI: The Indian Premier League 2026 clash between Delhi Capitals and Punjab Kings turned into a record-laden spectacle, with milestones tumbling thick and fast. After commanding knocks from KL Rahul and Nitish Rana for Delhi Capitals, Punjab Kings opener Prabhsimran Singh carved his name into an elite IPL list.Prabhsimran became only the third batter in IPL history to smash six boundaries in a single over. The blistering assault came against Mukesh Kumar, with the young opener hammering six fours in one over.The rare feat was first achieved by Ajinkya Rahane in 2012 while representing Rajasthan Royals, when he struck six consecutive fours off Sreenath Aravind of Royal Challengers Bengaluru.Nearly nine years later, Prithvi Shaw replicated the feat in 2021 for Delhi Capitals. Facing Shivam Mavi of Kolkata Knight Riders, Shaw slammed six fours in the very first over of the innings, becoming the first batter to do so during the powerplay.Now, Prabhsimran has joined this exclusive club, further highlighting the IPL’s reputation as a stage for fearless stroke-play.He capped off his sensational outing with a blistering 76 off just 26 balls before being dismissed by Kuldeep Yadav.
Article Summary: Prabhsimran singh becomes only the third batter in ipl history to smash six boundaries in a single over. The rare feat was first achieved by ajinkya rahane in 2012 while representing rajasthan royals. Nearly nine years later, prithvi shaw replicated the feat in 2021 for delhi capitals.

NEW DELHI: A red-hot KL Rahul produced one of the most extraordinary innings in IPL history, hammering an unbeaten 152 to power Delhi Capitals to a massive 264/2 against Punjab Kings at the Arun Jaitley Stadium on a scorching Saturday.On a sweltering 41-degree afternoon, Rahul tore into the PBKS bowling attack, hammering 16 fours and nine sixes in his 67-ball masterclass at a staggering strike rate of 226. His knock is now the highest individual score by an Indian batter in IPL history, surpassing several elite names, and also ranks as the third-highest overall in the tournament - behind Chris Gayle’s 175* and Brendon McCullum’s 158*.Rahul became only the third batter in IPL history to breach the 150-run mark, and just the second Indian after Tilak Varma to score 150-plus in men’s T20s. The innings also marked his fastest IPL century, coming in just 47 balls, bettering his previous best of 56.He was brilliantly supported by Nitish Rana, who blasted 91, as the duo stitched a stunning 220-run stand off just 95 balls - now the second-highest partnership in IPL history. Their assault powered DC to their highest-ever total, with a staggering 162 runs coming in overs 11-20, one of the most explosive death-over performances seen in the league.Rahul also rewrote franchise records, going past Rishabh Pant’s 128* to register the highest individual score for Delhi Capitals. In another remarkable feat, he became the first player in IPL history to score multiple centuries for three different teams - DC, PBKS, and Lucknow Super Giants.Among all IPL batters with over 1000 runs, Rahul’s consistency remains elite, with an average of 46.88 - second only to Sai Sudharsan.152* - KL Rahul vs PBKS, Delhi, 2026151 - Tilak Varma vs Meghalaya, Rajkot, 2024148 - Abhishek Sharma vs Bengal, Secunderabad, 2025147 - Shreyas Iyer vs Sikkim, Indore, 2019146* - Punit Bisht vs Mizoram, Chennai, 20218989 - Virat Kohli7183 - Rohit Sharma6769 - Shikhar Dhawan6565 - David Warner5579 - KL Rahul5528 - Suresh Raina5439 - MS DhoniOf the 109 batters with 1000-plus IPL runs, only Sai Sudharsan has a higher average (47.16) than Rahul’s 46.88.172/2 - RCB vs GL, Bengaluru, 2016162/2 - PBKS vs CSK, Cuttack, 2014162/1 - DC vs PBKS, Delhi, 2026175* - Chris Gayle (RCB) vs PWI, Bengaluru, 2013158* - Brendon McCullum (KKR) vs RCB, Bengaluru, 2008152* - KL Rahul (DC) vs PBKS, Delhi, 2026141 - Abhishek Sharma (SRH) vs PBKS, Hyderabad, 2025140* - Quinton de Kock (KKR) vs LSG, Mumbai DYP, 2022Rahul is the second Indian to register a 150-plus score in Men’s T20 cricket, after Tilak Varma, who’d scored 151 for Hyderabad against Meghalaya in Rajkot in 2024/25.229 - AB de Villiers & Virat Kohli vs GL, Bengaluru, 2016220 - KL Rahul & Nitish Rana vs PBKS, Delhi, 2026215* - AB de Villiers & Virat Kohli vs MI, Mumbai WS, 2015210* - KL Rahul & Quinton de Kock vs KKR, Mumbai DYP, 2022210 - Sai Sudharsan & Shubman Gill vs CSK, Ahmedabad, 2024
Article Summary: Kl rahul hits unbeaten 152 to power delhi capitals to 264/2 against punjab kings. Rahul's knock is now the highest individual score by an indian batter in ipl history. The innings also marked his fastest ipl century, coming in just 47 balls, bettering his previous best of 56.

Article Title: “He felt it wasn’t authentic”: Travis Kelce reportedly questioned Taylor Swift’s bond with Blake Lively and Ryan Reynolds long before things turned sour
Article Text:
Travis Kelce reportedly questioned Taylor Swift’s bond with Blake Lively and Ryan Reynolds long before things turned sour.(Image via Getty Images)

Travis Kelce reportedly did not want to hang out with Blake Lively and Ryan Reynolds alongside Taylor Swift

Taylor Swift remains busy as Travis Kelce goes vocal with his professional commitments

Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have had a pretty strong bond as they continue to hang out with each other’s friends and siblings.While things have taken a wrong turn between Taylor Swift and Blake Lively, it seems the Kansas City Chiefs’ star player, Travis Kelce, was never a big fans of the bond they once had.A few weeks ago, as per Rob Shuter, a source revealed, “He hated the double-dating…”The source added, “He felt like it was all optics and no authenticity” and didn’t want forced hangouts or performative friendships.”To make it worse, more than Blake Lively, it seems Travis Kelce had issues with her husband, the popular Hollywood actor Ryan Reynolds as he reportedly struggled to “trust him” and maintained distance from him.However, both Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have maintained their fair share of distance from anything related to the power couple in Hollywood, Blake Lively and Ryan Reynolds.For now, all that the billionaire pop star, Taylor Swift, is focusing on is their wedding as Travis Kelce remains busy with his work commitments.While Taylor Swift has remained private in the last few days, Travis Kelce announced his podcast, New Heights, will be hosted live in Los Angeles in June 2026.The Kansas City Chiefs’ star player also opened up about NFL Draft in a recent episode as he shares the type of players that the team should recruit.The popular tight end said, “I’m just hoping for a guy that loves ball, man. I think one of the things that you just want to have when you get back into the building after a season like last year, man, you just want guys that love what they’re [expletive] doing.”Travis Kelce added, “I think it’s one of the things that I look for in these young guys when they come in, is just how infectious is your energy? I need that out of these young guys.”While star player, Travis Kelce has been public about his work life, he has not hinted at any details about his high profile wedding to Taylor Swift as they seek privacy.
Article Summary: Travis kelce reportedly questioned taylor swift’s bond with blake lively and ryan reynolds long before things turned sour. Travis kelce announced his podcast, new heights, will be hosted live in los angeles in june 2026. The kansas city chiefs’ star player has not hinted at any details about his high profile wedding to taylor swift.

Article Title: NFL Trade Rumor: Green Bay Packers could target $11M former Los Angeles Rams' backup as veteran upgrade after inconsistent season
Article Text:
Green Bay Packers could target $11M former Los Angeles Rams backup as veteran upgrade after inconsistent season.(Image via X)

Green Bay Packers linked to former Los Angeles Rams ’ backup QB Jimmy Garoppolo

The Green Bay Packers’ performance in the last season dipped since 2024 as the team finished the season with 9 wins and 8 losses.As the Green Bay Packers lost the Wild Card round to the Chicago Bears, all eyes are on the next season as the team focuses on its roster.A few hours ago, Bleacher Report’s Zach Bachar predicted that the Green Bay Packers could make a move for the former Los Angeles Rams’ player, Jimmy Garoppolo.ID@undefinedCaption not available.Bleacher Report’s Zach Bachar noted in a recent report, “Green Bay still has Desmond Ridder on its roster, but Ridder has been inconsistent when give extended playing time throughout his NFL career. As the Packers look to enter the NFC playoff picture once again, they could choose to bring in a veteran passer instead.”Bleacher Report’s Zach Bachar added, “Garoppolo may be a strong fit in Green Bay given his experience playing under McVay. Packers head coach Matt LaFleur was previously on McVay's coaching staff, serving as the Rams' offensive coordinator in 2017.”However, the Green Bay Packers have maintained their distance from trade talks concerning Jimmy Garoppolo.Interestingly, the Los Angeles Rams are keen to re-sign Jimmy Garoppolo after his performance suffered in the last two seasons.A week ago, as per Stu Jackson of the team's official website, the Los Angeles Rams’ head coach, Sean McVay opened up about Jimmy Garoppolo as he said, "Hey, I'd love to have Jimmy Garoppolo back with us…”The popular head coach added, "That's a big deal for us. He's earned the right to be able to take his time and do whatever he wants."But Jimmy Garoppolo has stayed silent as he deals with speculations of a potential retirement after a poor run on the field in the last two seasons.In the last season, Jimmy Garoppolo played in only three games after signing a one year deal worth $11 million with the Los Angeles Rams.Jimmy Garoppolo did not attempt a pass as his appearances were limited to kneel-downs to seal victories.In 2024, Jimmy Garoppolo missed the preseason as he was suspended from the first two games of the regular season for violating the league's performance-enhancing drug policy.For now, all eyes are on what star player, Jimmy Garoppolo chooses to do next with his career amid retirement rumors.
Article Summary: Green bay packers could target $11m former los angeles rams backup as veteran upgrade after inconsistent season. Green bay packers lost the wild card round to the chicago bears. The packers still have desmond ridder on its roster, but ridder has been inconsistent when give extended playing time throughout his nfl career.

Article Title: ‘It’s against nature’: Cristiano Ronaldo’s former chef reveals why he doesn't drink milk, shares daily diet
Article Text:
Cristiano Ronaldo avoids milk entirely, former chef reveals strict diet behind elite longevity/ Image:Instagram

Why milk is excluded from his diet

Structure of Ronaldo’s daily diet

Ronaldo maintains under 10% body fat, avoids refined sugar, milk, and focuses on strict recovery routines/ Instagram

Physical condition and recovery routine

Ronaldo’s recovery routine includes intense sauna sessions and ice baths to maintain peak fitness and longevity/Instagram

Comparison with other players’ diets

Despite milk often being touted as a superdrink rich in protein, calcium and essential vitamins, and widely used by athletes for recovery and muscle support, Cristiano Ronaldo has avoided it as part of his long-standing diet, according to his former private chef, a choice that has aligned with the discipline behind his longevity into a 25th professional season.The 41-year-old, now at Al-Nassr, is closing in on 1,000 career goals after scoring his 969th in a win last weekend. Across spells with Manchester United and Real Madrid, Ronaldo has consistently pointed to discipline in diet and recovery as central to maintaining peak physical condition over many years at the top.Ronaldo’s former chef Giorgio Barone explained that milk is completely removed from his routine, not for performance reasons alone but because of a broader view about consumption.“No milk,” Barone told Covers.com, before outlining the reasoning in detail: “Humans are the only animals that drink the milk of other animals. No other animal drinks milk after three months. Calves don’t drink milk after the age of three months. Animals don’t drink the milk of other animals.“It does not exist in nature. Only human beings continue to drink milk up to 30, 40, 50, and 60 years, and in my view it is wrong. We breastfeed from our mothers, like dogs, wolves, cows and donkeys.It is normal.“After infancy it is not normal. It is against nature.”Barone described Ronaldo’s diet as controlled but varied, built around consistency rather than restriction for its own sake.“Cristiano Ronaldo’s diet is balanced,” he said. “He eats a little bit of everything, but it’s always healthy.”He then detailed how that plays out across the day: “Starting with breakfast, he would have an avocado with coffee, eggs and no sugar. Absolutely no sugar. Lunch could be chicken, fish and always vegetables. If he needs carbohydrates, he gets them through vegetables, so he doesn’t need anything made with flour.“Nothing like pasta, bread and other types of food. In the evening, he eats light foods, usually fish or meat in the form of fillet. It’s always accompanied by vegetables.”The approach removes refined sugar entirely and avoids flour-based carbohydrates, relying instead on protein, vegetables and healthy fats.That structure is reflected in Ronaldo’s physical condition, with body fat levels maintained below 10 per cent.His routine extends beyond diet, incorporating recovery methods such as saunas and ice baths, which he and his partner Georgina Rodriguez are known to use regularly.The same discipline has been visible in public moments as well. During the 2021 European Championship, Ronaldo moved a bottle of Coca-Cola away from a press conference table and told viewers to “drink water,” a moment that wiped billions off the company’s market value.Barone also addressed comparisons with Erling Haaland, who has spoken about drinking raw milk as part of his own routine.While rejecting milk, Barone agreed with other elements of that approach, particularly the inclusion of organ meats: “I agree with [Erling Haaland’s diet of] eating the organs. The liver, heart and brain are all healthy foods. They are superfoods. Cristiano liked liver too. I love it. It’s very rich in iron, and it’s important in the diet, so for the organs, I approve, but not for the milk.”
Article Summary: Cristiano ronaldo avoids milk entirely, former chef reveals strict diet behind elite longevity. Former chef giorgio barone reveals the structure of ronaldo's daily diet. The 41-year-old maintains under 10% body fat, avoids refined sugar, milk, and focuses on strict recovery routines.

Article Title: Austin Reaves Injury Update: Is Austin Reaves playing tonight? Los Angeles Lakers guard listed questionable for Game 3 vs Houston Rockets
Article Text:
Los Angeles Lakers' shooting guard Austin Reaves (Image via: Getty Images)

Austin Reaves recovery timeline explained as Los Angeles Lakers manage his return vs. the Houston Rockets

The NBA Playoffs have officially begun, and as the first round moves locations, the passion is building to a fever pitch. Six of the eight series are locked in close contests as of last night. Both the Minnesota Timberwolves and the Atlanta Hawks defeated the Knicks and Nuggets in a crucial Game 3 victory.With a 2-1 advantage, they were in a strong position to go back on the road and try to win. SG Austin Reaves of the Los Angeles Lakers is presently listed as questionable for Friday's NBA playoff game between the Lakers and Rockets on Prime Video at 8:00 p.m. ET.The Lakers have won their first two games without Austin Reaves, their main scorer, defying the odds. Since April 2, he has been out of commission. The NBA's top scorer (33.5 PPG) is predicted to miss the rest of the first round due to Reaves' devastating loss.But there is a ray of hope for Austin Reaves. Reaves is recuperating much more quickly than Doncic and is listed as questionable for tonight's Game 3 in Houston. He is expected to return for Game 5 in Los Angeles even if he misses the two-game stay in Texas.After sustaining the injury on April 2, he has missed the entire postseason thus far, but his recent improvement shows that he is getting better.The guard is making well in his rehabilitation and has already resumed playing on the floor.His predicament has emerged as one of the series' central narratives, particularly in light of the Lakers' 2-0 lead despite his absence. Depending on how he reacts, a final decision is anticipated closer to tip-off in Game 3.Given Reaves' career-high, his return is crucial to relieving pressure on the rotation. However, in order to prevent any setbacks at a crucial period of the season, the Lakers have adopted a careful approach, keeping him inactive through the early playoff games because oblique injuries are especially sensitive and quick to aggravate.Although Reaves has been out of the lineup for a few weeks due to an oblique injury, Los Angeles Lakers SG Austin Reaves is making progress toward a possible comeback. The NBA's injury report states that Reaves is formally labeled as questionable for Friday's game against the Rockets.Since the Lakers' 139-96 defeat to the Oklahoma City Thunder on April 2, the guard has been sidelined due to a Grade 2 left oblique strain. For Game 3, Reaves was upgraded to doubtful.Reaves might return in Game 3 or Game 4 if he is unable to play on Friday, according to ESPN's Shams Charania. Lakers head coach JJ Redick reportedly told ESPN's Dave McMenamin that Reaves started his return-to-play program earlier this week and took part in one-on-one court work on Tuesday.Reaves has averaged 5.5 assists, 4.7 rebounds, 1.1 steals, and a career-high 23.3 points per game. The guard for the Lakers made 36.0% of his shots from beyond the arc.
Article Summary: Lakers have won their first two games without austin reaves, their main scorer, defying the odds. The nba's top scorer (33.5 ppg) is predicted to miss the rest of the first round due to reaves' devastating loss. Reaves is recuperating much more quickly than doncic and is listed as questionable for tonight's game 3 in houston.
